```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(GEOquery)
library(DESeq2)
library(fgsea)
library(msigdbr)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)
```

```{r}
# ── 1. Sample metadata ───────────────────────────────────────
con   <- file("data/GSE64810_series_matrix.txt", "r")
lines <- base::readLines(con)
close(con)

# Parse sample IDs directly from the series matrix
id_line    <- lines[grepl("^!Sample_geo_accession", lines)]
sample_ids <- gsub('"', '', strsplit(id_line, "\t")[[1]][-1])

# verify they look right
head(sample_ids)  # should show GSM1580869, GSM1580870, etc.

# Parse characteristic fields
char_lines <- lines[grepl("^!Sample_characteristics_ch1", lines)]

parse_char <- function(line, prefix) {
  vals <- gsub('"', '', strsplit(line, "\t")[[1]][-1])
  as.character(sub(prefix, "", vals))
}

metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_id    = sample_ids,
  tissue       = parse_char(char_lines[1], "tissue: "),
  diagnosis    = parse_char(char_lines[2], "diagnosis: "),
  pmi          = as.numeric(parse_char(char_lines[3], "pmi: ")),
  age_of_death = as.numeric(parse_char(char_lines[4], "age of death: ")),
  rin          = as.numeric(parse_char(char_lines[5], "rin: ")),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# set rownames to sample IDs for DESeq2 alignment
rownames(metadata) <- metadata$sample_id

# verify
head(rownames(metadata))  # should now show GSM158xxxx
```

```{r}
write.csv(metadata, "data/metadata.csv", row.names = FALSE)
message("✓ metadata.csv written — ", nrow(metadata), " samples")
```

```{r}
# ── 2. DESeq2: normalized counts + DE results ────────────────
raw_counts <- read_tsv(
  "data/GSE64810_raw_counts_GRCh38.p13_NCBI.tsv",
  col_names = TRUE, show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  filter(complete.cases(.)) %>%
  column_to_rownames("GeneID")
 
# Align metadata rows to count matrix columns
meta_aligned           <- metadata
rownames(meta_aligned) <- meta_aligned$sample_id
meta_aligned           <- meta_aligned[colnames(raw_counts), ]
 
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = raw_counts,
  colData   = meta_aligned,
  design    = ~ diagnosis
)
dds <- DESeq(dds)
res <- results(dds)
```

```{r}
set.seed(42)
fgsea_res <- fgsea(pathways = pathways, stats = ranks, nperm = 10000)
 
fgsea_res %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(pathway, NES, pval, padj, size) %>%
  write.csv("data/fgsea_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
message("✓ fgsea_results.csv written")
```

```{r}
message("All done. Four CSVs in sample code/data/:")
message("  metadata.csv, normalized_counts.csv, deseq2_results.csv, fgsea_results.csv")
```
